variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 10918 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 10918 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 10918 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 310.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 200.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 10.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 367.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 357.0 mm

variants.title: Donaldson P777152 Air Filter, Primary Round | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 10918
variants.option1Value: Donaldson P777152 Air Filter, Primary Round | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 10918
variants.description: Why Choose Donaldson Air Filters? Strong, pliable gasket is compressed against the air cleaner housing to create a tight seal. • High-efficiency cellulose media performs across a wide range of heavy-duty engine applications. • Corrosion resistant, coated steel liners support media during operation and help maximize airflow. • Pleatloc™ feature ensures uniform pleat spacing and prevents media from bunching to promote longer service life.

variants.title: Mann Filter C 31 1093/2 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 10918
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter C 31 1093/2 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 10918
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.
specifications: Style: Air Filter, Dimension A: 310.0 mm, Dimension B: 200.0 mm, Dimension C: 10.3 mm, Dimension H: 370.0 mm

variants.title: Fleetguard AF4720 Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 10918
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF4720 Air Filter, Primary | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 10918
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF4720 axial seal primary air filter ensures a proper seal and prevent leaks to prevent airborne contaminants from reaching the combustion chamber.
